subject: feat(theme): use DaisyUI tokens for all colors, remove @theme block
body:
All colors now come from DaisyUI semantic tokens — zero custom color
definitions remain.

- Removed @theme block entirely (overspend/underspend/data-neutral were
  unused; brand palette already removed)
- Created useThemeColor.ts: resolveThemeColor() reads DaisyUI's oklch
  CSS variables from <html> at runtime and converts to hex via a 1x1
  canvas pixel — no manual color math, browser handles gamut mapping
- CashflowGraph: replaced 8 hardcoded hex values with DaisyUI token
  reads (info=actuals, warning=forecast, success=balance, base-content
  =labels, base-300=grid). Chart colors now adapt to any DaisyUI theme.
  Hex fallbacks only used if CSS variable read fails (SSR, tests).
- Print CSS: kept hardcoded hex — print output is always forced white/black
  regardless of theme

Tags: theme, daisyui, charts, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: minor
